channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Oil price hits highest since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
item.description: Oil prices jumped after a report that US Central Command prepared a plan for strikes on Iran. Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.

item.title: Environmental disaster fears grip Russia as Ukraine targets oil refineries
item.description: Ukrainian forces hit Russia's Tuapse oil refinery, causing spills and black rain. Ukrainian forces have hammered one of Russia's largest sites in Tuapse, causing oil spills and black rain. Environmental disaster fears grip Russia as Ukraine targets oil refineries.

item.title: Trump welcomes Putin’s offer of Victory Day ceasefire in ‘very good’ phone call
item.description: US President Trump had a "very good" phone call with Russian President Putin, who offered a ceasefire in Ukraine on Victory Day. The offer was welcomed by Trump. Ukraine-Russia war latest: Trump welcomes Putin’s offer of Victory Day ceasefire in ‘very good’ phone call The Independent.

item.title: Attacks on Jewish Targets in Europe Suggest Hybrid Warfare
item.description: A shadowy Islamist group claimed attacks on Jewish targets in Europe. Officials are investigating similar attacks across Europe, all claimed by a shadowy Islamist group that may be using low-cost, unsophisticated methods to sow fear in Jewish communities.

item.title: Israel Intercepts Aid Flotilla Headed to Gaza
item.description: Israel intercepted an aid flotilla headed to Gaza in international waters near Greece. Activists said the Israeli military boarded and disabled their boats in international waters near Greece. Israel Intercepts Aid Flotilla Headed to Gaza.

item.title: How the War in Iran is Affecting Africa’s Economy and Fuel Supply
item.description: Africans are bracing for tougher times due to the Middle East cease-fire. Despite the fragile cease-fire in the Middle East, many Africans say they are bracing for tougher times ahead and making difficult decisions about the future.

item.title: BNP Drops After Hiking Provisions On Macro Uncertainty
item.description: BNP dropped after hiking provisions due to macro uncertainty. BNP Drops After Hiking Provisions On Macro Uncertainty Bloomberg. com.

item.title: Iran has enough enriched uranium for ten nuclear bomb: UN
item.description: Iran has enough enriched uranium for ten nuclear bombs, according to the UN. This development comes amid heightened tensions over Iran's nuclear program. Iran has enough enriched uranium for ten nuclear bomb: UN The Independent.

item.title: Pakistan opens up road trade routes into Iran amid Hormuz blockade
item.description: Pakistan has opened road trade routes into Iran to move stranded cargo. The overland corridor was activated due to disrupted shipping caused by US-Iran tensions. With shipping disrupted by US-Iran tensions, Islamabad activates overland corridor to move stranded cargo into Iran.

item.title: Trump says he spoke with Putin about a possible ceasefire in Ukraine
item.description: US President Trump spoke with Russian President Putin about a possible ceasefire in Ukraine. The conversation also touched on the situation in Iran. President Trump said he talked to Russian President Putin Wednesday about the wars in Ukraine and Iran.

item.title: White House shooter posed in selfies at hotel ahead of attack on Trump, pics released
item.description: The White House shooter took selfies at a hotel before attacking Trump. The images were released as part of the investigation into the incident. White House shooter posed in selfies at hotel ahead of attack on Trump, pics released.

item.title: Police in Australia Were Warned of Terror Risk Before Bondi Attack, Report Says
item.description: Australian police were warned of a terror risk to the Jewish community before the Bondi attack. A security group had flagged the threat days before the mass shooting in Sydney.

item.title: US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Iran President Says US Blockade "Doomed To Fail"
item.description: Trump and Putin discussed the Iran war in a phone call, focusing on the situation in the Persian Gulf. US Israel Iran War Ceasefire News LIVE Updates:. US-Israel-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: Trump, Putin Speak Over Phone, Discuss Iran War.

item.title: Iran president says U.S. naval blockade 'doomed to fail'
item.description: Oil surged to a four-year high after Trump's blockade warning, while Defence Secretary Hegseth faced questions on Iran. Meanwhile, Defence Secretary Peter Hegseth faced withering questions about Iran in first congressional appearance since war began.

item.title: What’s happening on day 62 as Trump asks Iran to ‘give up’?
item.description: US President Trump claims the blockade of Iranian ports is working, urging Tehran to 'give up' amid tensions. Trump made the statement as the US blockade continues to restrict Iranian trade.

item.title: Why the UAE is leaving OPEC
item.description: The UAE is leaving OPEC due to output quotas capping production at 3.2-3.4 million barrels per day.

item.title: White House Quiet As China Tightens Trade Rules Ahead Of Trump-Xi Meet
item.description: China has tightened trade rules ahead of the Trump-Xi meeting, sparking concerns among analysts and US officials about the precedent set by Beijing's measures. Analysts and some US officials worry about the precedent set by Beijing's measures.

item.title: Israel says intercepted 175 Gaza flotilla activists on 20 boats
item.description: Israel intercepted approximately 175 activists from 20 boats attempting to reach Gaza, with the activists being taken to Israel peacefully. “Approximately 175 activists from more than 20 boats are now making their way peacefully to Israel,” Israel’s Foreign Ministry said in a statement, including a video of the activists aboard an Israeli navy ship.

item.title: Iran at UN accuses US of nuclear double standards, misuse of NPT platform
item.description: Iran accused the US of nuclear double standards and misuse of the NPT platform at the UN, criticizing American actions. Iran at UN accuses US of nuclear double standards, misuse of NPT platform The Times of India.

item.title: Could the US-Iran war become a protracted ‘frozen’ conflict?
item.description: The US-Iran conflict is becoming a protracted and costly war of attrition, with no permanent deal in sight to end the fighting. In the absence of a permanent deal, the war between the US and Iran is becoming one of attrition despite huge costs.
